scope.dependency_radius: ADR source set plus current canonical target docs referenced by the ADR index
constraints: Do not reclassify project-specific truth into .ai
Assign one primary landing target per ADR
Mark multi-bucket ADRs explicitly instead of forcing a false single-category mapping

inputs.architecture_target: Turn ADRs into stable .ai/.dev canonical sources and reduce ADRs to governance/history only

steps: Reviewed ADR governance and portability rules
Reviewed ADR index and sampled representative ADR content
Mapped each ADR to bucket A/B/C/D and a primary landing target
Recorded early normalization findings for Stage 2
validation: Every ADR listed in INDEX.md appears in the inventory table
Each ADR has a bucket and a primary landing target
Multi-bucket ADRs are explicitly called out for split handling
deferred_items: Normalize landing zones for guide-vs-standard overlaps
Migrate content and retire duplicate ADRs

results.summary: Completed Stage 1 inventory and target bucketing for the current ADR set.
